strategy_engine.notes: Coinbase Advanced sandbox demo profile. Sandboxed by default: execution_mode per strategy controls sandbox routing, so no live order is placed until Coinbase's gated sandbox write test has proven the venue. Credentials resolve from COINBASE_SANDBOX_API_KEY / COINBASE_SANDBOX_SECRET_KEY. Coinbase Advanced is spot-only (ccxt_default_type=spot). Set HERMX_LIVE_TRADING=true to enable live execution.

notes: Coinbase Advanced sandbox only. New venue stays DISARMED until its gated write test passes.
